title: potentilla subglobosa
intro: Potentilla subglobosa, also known as the dwarf potentilla or globular cinquefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Potentilla subglobosa are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
